dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) ADX > 25 confirms downtrend; (2) close below SMA_50 confirms downtrend; (3) close above pivot confirms retracement to resistance; (4) low of current candle below prev_high indicates bearish candle taking down the high of the last green candle. Stop-loss placed above entry candle high with 2% buffer. Exit when price closes above SMA_50 (trend reversal). Pivot used as resistance proxy since specific overhead MA not specified by author.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) ADX > 25 confirms downtrend; (2) close below SMA_50 confirms downtrend; (3) close above pivot confirms retracement to resistance; (4) low of current candle below prev_high indicates bearish candle taking down the high of the last green candle. Stop-loss placed above entry candle high with 2% buffer. Exit when price closes above SMA_50 (trend reversal). Pivot used as resistance proxy since specific overhead MA not specified by author.

source_rule_text: In a downtrend, enter short once a bearish candle appears (low of the last green candle is taken down) after price retraces to resistance.
